summary: REMAINS FAIL_EXECUTION. Original blocking findings (BF-3D-001/002: column name mismatch) PARTIALLY RESOLVED by hotfix — column NAMES are now correct (error_stage, error_type, error_payload, error_context). However, NEW blocking finding: column VALUES violate CHECK constraints. test_shows_dead_items_with_error_context (line 238) inserts error_stage='test_retry' (NOT in chk_lcs_errors_stage) and error_type='VALIDATION' (uppercase, CHECK requires lowercase 'validation'). INSERT will throw CheckViolation at runtime. CONSTITUTIONAL CHECKS: ALL 4 PASS — Cantonal (retry_queue SUPPORTING, v_dead_letter_queue view, cantonal pair intact), Registry-First (CTB pre-registration before CREATE TABLE), Sovereign ID (no minting), No sideways calls (all within lcs schema). ENVELOPE: PASS. SCOPE: PASS. EXECUTION: FAIL. AC1-AC7 met. AC8 FAIL — test_shows_dead_items_with_error_context will throw CheckViolation before assertions are reached. View DDL is CORRECT (le.error_stage, le.error_type, le.error_payload AS error_context). Migration functions have no direct lcs_errors INSERTs (Phase 3D functions route through retry_queue, not lcs_errors). The only broken component is the test INSERT values.

blocking_findings.title: Test INSERT values violate lcs_errors CHECK constraints
blocking_findings.detail: test_shows_dead_items_with_error_context (test_retry_dead_letter_governor.py, line 238-243) inserts a synthetic error row with constraint-violating VALUES. Column names are correct (fixed by hotfix), but: (1) error_stage='test_retry' is NOT in chk_lcs_errors_stage — allowed values: cid_processing, sid_creation, mid_minting, dispatch_finalization, canonical_update, emission_validation, emission_processing, cadence_check. (2) error_type='VALIDATION' is uppercase — chk_lcs_errors_type requires lowercase: validation, state_violation, expired, conflict, external_fail. INSERT will throw psycopg2.errors.CheckViolation at runtime. Assertions on lines 264-265 match the wrong values and must also be updated.
blocking_findings.action: Change INSERT values: error_stage from 'test_retry' to 'emission_processing' (semantically appropriate for retry/dead-letter testing), error_type from 'VALIDATION' to 'validation' (lowercase). Update assertions: line 264 from 'test_retry' to 'emission_processing', line 265 from 'VALIDATION' to 'validation'.

resolved_findings.title: Test INSERT used non-existent lcs_errors columns (error_source, error_message)
resolved_findings.resolution: Fixed by hotfix AR_20260224_LCS_ERRORS_COLUMN_HOTFIX. Column names changed to error_stage, error_type, error_payload. Column names now correct. However, VALUES still violate CHECK constraints — see BF-3D-003.

resolved_findings.title: Test SELECT referenced columns not exposed by view (error_source, error_message)
resolved_findings.resolution: Fixed by hotfix AR_20260224_LCS_ERRORS_COLUMN_HOTFIX. SELECT now uses error_stage, error_type, error_context — matches view contract. Verified correct.

contract_triad.description: DDL -> View -> Test alignment check for v_dead_letter_queue (post-hotfix)

view_columns.alignment: CORRECT — all columns exist in DDL

contract_triad.verdict: View is correct. Test column names are correct (hotfix resolved). Test VALUES violate CHECK constraints. One fix remaining.

acceptance_criteria_status.AC1: PASS — retry_queue exists with deterministic retry workflow fields and unique active-item constraint
acceptance_criteria_status.AC3: PASS — lcs_errors extended with is_retryable and retry_strategy columns
acceptance_criteria_status.AC4: PASS — fn_enqueue_retry is idempotent, computes deterministic next_attempt_at, returns retry_id
acceptance_criteria_status.AC5: PASS — fn_process_retry_batch uses SKIP LOCKED, deterministic ordering, forward-only escalation, JSON summary
acceptance_criteria_status.AC6: PASS — v_dead_letter_queue exists, references correct lcs_errors columns, will CREATE successfully
acceptance_criteria_status.AC7: PASS — lcs_worker EXECUTE-only on both functions, REVOKE ALL on retry_queue
acceptance_criteria_status.AC8: FAIL — test_shows_dead_items_with_error_context INSERT values violate CHECK constraints (error_stage='test_retry' not allowed, error_type='VALIDATION' uppercase). Test will throw CheckViolation.

reclassification_history.reason: Original audit stamped PASS with critical findings. User corrected: critical findings that hard-fail tests = FAIL_EXECUTION. Test uses non-existent columns (BF-3D-001, BF-3D-002).
Hotfix resolved column NAME mismatch (BF-3D-001/002). New finding BF-3D-003: column VALUES violate CHECK constraints. Classification unchanged — still FAIL_EXECUTION.
